'''grn''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:bright|bright]]".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-r-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:bright|bright]]
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:goranithi|goranithi]] || [[word:goraniji|goraniji]] || [[word:goranishi|goranishi]] || [[word:goraniki|goraniki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:goranuthuthu|goranuthuthu]] || [[word:goranujuju|goranujuju]] || [[word:goranushushu|goranushushu]] || [[word:goranukuku|goranukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:goranuthu|goranuthu]] || [[word:goranuju|goranuju]] || [[word:goranushu|goranushu]] || [[word:goranuku|goranuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:goranufthuf|goranufthuf]] || [[word:goranufjuf|goranufjuf]] || [[word:goranufshuf|goranufshuf]] || [[word:goranufkuf|goranufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:goranethe|goranethe]] || [[word:goraneje|goraneje]] || [[word:goraneshe|goraneshe]] || [[word:goraneke|goraneke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:goranothotho|goranothotho]] || [[word:goranojojo|goranojojo]] || [[word:goranoshosho|goranoshosho]] || [[word:goranokoko|goranokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:goranotho|goranotho]] || [[word:goranojo|goranojo]] || [[word:goranosho|goranosho]] || [[word:goranoko|goranoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:goranofthof|goranofthof]] || [[word:goranofjof|goranofjof]] || [[word:goranofshof|goranofshof]] || [[word:goranofkof|goranofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:goranïfthïf|goranïfthïf]] || [[word:goranïfjïf|goranïfjïf]] || [[word:goranïfshïf|goranïfshïf]] || [[word:goranïfkïf|goranïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:goranïfthïfthïf|goranïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:goranïfjïfjïf|goranïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:goranïfshïfshïf|goranïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:goranïfkïfkïf|goranïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:goranïfthïf|goranïfthïf]] || [[word:goranïfjïf|goranïfjïf]] || [[word:goranïfshïf|goranïfshïf]] || [[word:goranïfkïf|goranïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:goranïfthïf|goranïfthïf]] || [[word:goranïfjïf|goranïfjïf]] || [[word:goranïfshïf|goranïfshïf]] || [[word:goranïfkïf|goranïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:goranæthæ|goranæthæ]] || [[word:goranæjæ|goranæjæ]] || [[word:goranæshæ|goranæshæ]] || [[word:goranækæ|goranækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:goranathatha|goranathatha]] || [[word:goranajaja|goranajaja]] || [[word:goranashasha|goranashasha]] || [[word:goranakaka|goranakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:goranatha|goranatha]] || [[word:goranaja|goranaja]] || [[word:goranasha|goranasha]] || [[word:goranaka|goranaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:goranafthaf|goranafthaf]] || [[word:goranafjaf|goranafjaf]] || [[word:goranafshaf|goranafshaf]] || [[word:goranafkaf|goranafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:goranasha|goranasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:goranshëasha|goranshëasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goranroasha|goranroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goranmuasha|goranmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:goranyaasha|goranyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogorannkshëasha|gogorannkshëasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogorannkroasha|gogorannkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogorannkmuasha|gogorannkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogorannkyaasha|gogorannkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:goraranasha|goraranasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:goraranshëasha|goraranshëasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goraranroasha|goraranroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goraranmuasha|goraranmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:goraranyaasha|goraranyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogorarannkshëasha|gogorarannkshëasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogorarannkroasha|gogorarannkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogorarannkmuasha|gogorarannkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogorarannkyaasha|gogorarannkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:gerænasha|gerænasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gerænshëasha|gerænshëasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gerænroasha|gerænroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gerænmuasha|gerænmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gerænyaasha|gerænyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogerænnkshëasha|gogerænnkshëasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogerænnkroasha|gogerænnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogerænnkmuasha|gogerænnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogerænnkyaasha|gogerænnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:gorfanasha|gorfanasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gorfanshëasha|gorfanshëasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorfanroasha|gorfanroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gorfanmuasha|gorfanmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gorfanyaasha|gorfanyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogorfannkshëasha|gogorfannkshëasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogorfannkroasha|gogorfannkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogorfannkmuasha|gogorfannkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogorfannkyaasha|gogorfannkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:words 8d63c8d]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
